title: EMERGENCY 90 DAY SHELTER PROGRAM - 211info
text: ANN'S HEART WOMEN'S SHELTER EMERGENCY 90 DAY SHELTER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing services. Guests will have access to personalized case management services with the goal being to remove barriers to attaining permanent housing and may stay in the shelter for up to 90 days (with possible 30 day extensions). Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness who are 18 and older and identify as female. Clients may bring 1 cat or dog. Pets must have shots and preferrably be spayed or neutuered. Hours: Not applicable Email (541) 897-9764 102 . Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 897-9764 ext 102 Case Manager Tami [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Intake is paused at this time FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Women If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
